input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.8.3
            TITLE: the bspd must monitor for the following conditions:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.8.3: The BSPD must monitor for the following conditions:
IC.4.8.3 The BSPD must monitor for the following conditions:  
a. Both of the following for more than one second:  
• Demand for Hard Braking   IC.4.6  
• Throttle more than 10% open  IC.4.4   
b. Loss of signal from the braking sensor(s) for more than 100 msec 
c. Loss of signal from the throttle sensor(s) for more than 100 msec 
d. Removal of power from the BSPD circuit

final_answer: The BSPD must monitor for the following conditions: a. Both of the following for more than one second: • Demand for Hard Braking IC.4.6 • Throttle more than 10% open IC.4.4 b. Loss of signal from the braking sensor(s) for more than 100 msec c. Loss of signal from the throttle sensor(s) for more than 100 msec d. Removal of power from the BSPD circuit
